serverInfo.name: OneDrive-Skills
serverInfo.title: OneDrive Skills
serverInfo.description: Discover and read Skills (SKILL.md) instructions and Skill files stored in your OneDrive /skills folder.

instructions: Read-only Skills access. Skills are stored under /skills in the user's default OneDrive. Use onedrive_openskills_list to enumerate skills and onedrive_openskills_read / onedrive_openskills_read_file to retrieve SKILL.md or a relative file within a skill folder.
